{{Quote|Iwo, I won't be getting you that caf.|Malan Tugrina to Mon Mothma|<ref name="X-Wing: Solo Command">''[[X-Wing: Solo Command]]''</ref>}}
'''Malan Tugrina''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served as one of [[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma's]] faithful assistants as well as her bodyguard. His past was full of devoted service to the [[Chief Councilor]]. He had a perfect memory, likened to a [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droid's]] ability to retain information. He was present when [[Tolokai]], her [[Gotal/Legends|Gotal]] bodyguard, attacked her under the influence of the brainwashing of [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]]'s [[Project Funeral]]. Malan fell with a [[Vibroblade/Legends|vibroblade]] to his chest, but succeeded in forcing Tolokai down the stairs in a [[Death/Legends|fatal]] fall that broke the assailant's neck.
